characters.name: Cold Dog
characters.description: Cold DogNicknamesThe DogDate of Birth1970GenderMaleOccupationRapper, DancerFirst Appearance"The Concert"Portrayed byFlex Alexander Cold Dogis a rapper and the former  artist ofTiaandTamera. Cold Dog was born and raised in Cincinnati, Ohio. His birth name was either Calvin Herbert or Herbert Calvin, but in 1993, his name was legally changed to Cold Dog. At the age of 14, he began dancing with Bad M.C. on his first world tour, and subsequently became famous as a rapper.As of 1994, he had released one album which went double platinum and a number of songs, including "Unleash Me" and "Twin Boo-Tay". His song lyrics are known for being especially degrading and insulting to women, which reflects in his behavior towards them in real life.

characters.name: Diavian Johnson
characters.description: Diavian JohnsonNicknamesDeeDate of BirthUnknownGenderFemaleOccupationStudentRelationshipSteven - high school boyfriendFirst AppearanceShow Me The MoneyLast AppearanceFly Away HomePortrayed byAlexis FieldsDiavian Johnson is one of Tia and Tamera's friends. She is one of the only friends who also attended college with them.  Tia and Diavian are good friends. They have shared many fun moments such as going to Jordan's graduation party or studying for the Black History test. Diavian once kissed Tyreke which provoked Tia.

characters.name: Guardian Angel
characters.description: Guardian Angelis the twenty-second and final episode of thefourth season. Tamera hangs out with this girl named Vanessa, making Tia feel left out. However, Tamera then discovers that Vanessa is a shoplifter; Ray lets go of his old wife, and learns to accept Lisa.

characters.name: Jimmy Campbell
characters.description: Jimmy CampbellNicknamesSoupy (by friends and family)Date of BirthUnknownGenderMaleOccupationVarious Business EndeavorsSanta ClausRelativesUnnamed Ex-WifeRay Campbell(Son)Ellen Campbell(Daughter-in-Law; deceased)Tamera Campbell(Adoptive Granddaughter)Tia Landry(Adoptive Granddaughter)RelationshipLisa Landry(interest)First AppearanceGrandpa CampbellLast AppearanceShoelessPortrayed bySherman HemsleyJimmy "Soupy" Campbell (Sherman Hemsley) is Ray's father. Santa Claus He states in that episode that he got the nickname "Soupy" not because his surname is Campbell (which would be a play on the Campbell's soup brand), but because of the tight situations he gets himself into, claiming "[he is] always in hot water".

characters.name: Jordan Bennet
characters.description: Jordan BennetGenderMaleOccupationStudentRelativesUnnamed MotherUnnamed FatherUnnamed GrandmotherRelationshipTamera Campbell(Girlfriend)First AppearanceTwo’s CompanyLast AppearanceFly Away HomePortrayed byDeon Richmond Jordan Martin Bennetis Tamera Campbell's boyfriend and Tyreke's best friend, he was first introduced in Season 5. He says what he wants and is not afraid of debate. In contrast to close friendTyreke, Jordan is headstrong and not submissive to anyone who wishes to govern his choices, except when it's honor to a relationship of his sworn loyalty (e.g.Tamera). He is goofy and impulsive. He can be sexist at times. He says what he wants and is not afraid of debate. He is goofy and impulsive. He can be sexist at times.

characters.name: Little Ray
characters.description: Little Raya stray Orange tabby Cat thatLisa Landryadopted in "Cheater, Cheater". Though, he was seen, and referred by name, in the previous episode “Slumber Party” Little Ray was named that soRay Campbellwould approve of keeping the cat. Ray hates Little Ray. Little Ray jumps into his car and also scratched up his favorite chair. Lisa says she "Loves Little Ray to death." She also approves of Little Ray scratching the chair.

characters.name: Marlon Baker
characters.description: Marlon Baker(Aaron Lohr)  Marlon is a student at Roosevelt High. He is seen during the fourth season. Marlon is a hockey jock who likes to make fun of students. This is usually Tia and Tamera. In one instance when Lisa was the school cafeteria lady, he Marlon made fun of Tia as a result. He became the male version of Rhonda Coley, or sorts, for that season. Marlon has, at the same time, flirted with the girls, which they don't like, adding to their rift.  Marlon is a hockey jock who likes to make fun of students. This is usually Tia and Tamera. characters.name: Matthew Sullivan
characters.description: Matthew SullivanNicknamesMattDate of Birth3rd mayGenderMaleOccupationPhoto JournalistRelativesTia Landry(daughter)Tamera Campbell(daughter)RelationshipRacelle Gavin(girlfriend; deceased)First AppearanceFather's DayLast AppearanceFly Away HomePortrayed byTony Carreiro Matthew "Matt" Sullivanis the biological father ofTia LandryandTamera Campbell. Matt first met Racelle when the Detroit Free Press assigned him to do a photo essay on her murals in the 1970s and they  instantly fell in love with each other. They were living together within weeks of meeting each other.

characters.name: Racelle Gavin
characters.description: Racelle GavinNicknamesMom MommyDate of BirthAugust  11, 1957 (age 30)GenderFemaleOccupationArtistPainterRelativesTia Landry(daughter)Tamera Campbell(daughter)RelationshipMatt Sullivan(boyfriend)First AppearanceYou Are So Beautiful(Name mentioned)Last AppearanceFather's Day(Photo seen)Portrayed byWanda Charles Racelle Gavinwas the biological mother ofTia LandryandTamera Campbell. Racelle and Matt met when he was assigned to do a photo essay on her murals. They instantly fell in love. They were living together within weeks of meeting each other. They planned to get married; however, they got separated when Newsweek asked Matt to do an assignment of a lifetime in Tel Aviv.

characters.description: RussellNicknamesRussGenderMaleOccupationRapper, dancerRelationshipTia LandryFirst AppearanceWedding Bells & Box BoysLast AppearanceWedding Bells & Box BoysPortrayed byAaron Lohr Russellis a bagger at Food Boy and the onetime love interest ofTia Landry. characters.name: Steve Peiser
characters.description: Steve PeiserNicknamesStinky SteveMr. PeyserGenderMaleOccupationRocket Burger ManagerFirst AppearanceJoey’s ChoiceLast AppearanceDream LoverPortrayed byVictor Togunde Mr. Peyser Stinky" Steve Peiser(Victor Togunde) – is the manager of Rocket Burger, thefast foodrestaurant Tia and Tamera work at during season two and early season three. Steve is very dedicated to Rocket Burger and strives for professionalism (with the exception of when he asking out Employees). He is mostly unlikable. He prefers to be called Mr. Peyser and does not appreciate when the employees are not working hard enough. He shows to be sensitive when Tia gets into a car accident but ultimately wants her to get back to work.

characters.name: Stop In The Name Of Fun
characters.description: Stop In The Name Of Funis the second episode ofseason six. A college talent contest turns to a battle of wills between the twins when Tia the perfectionist agrees to direct Tamera, Diavian and Simone's girl-group routine. Meanwhile, Tyreke and Lisa attend a time-share seminar in search of free gifts. Tia MowryasTia Landry

characters.name: Tahj Mowry
characters.description: Tahj Mowryis the real-life little brother of Tia and Tamera Mowry. He played several roles on Sister Sister. In this episode he played Tia's little cousin Tahj. Tahj was visiting and turned out to do chores for Tia, Tamera and Lisa. In this episode Tahj played a little boy named Sammy who went to the mall to see Santa multiple times. The first time he sees Santa get arrested. Later on he is seen asking Santa (who is really Jimmy Campbell) for a monopoly. He is later seen in line again waiting impatiently because he has a bedtime.

characters.name: Tamera Campbell
characters.description: Tamera CampbellTamera CampbellNicknamesSister girl (byTia Landry) Lady TDate of BirthBorn: November 28th 1979GenderFemaleOccupationStudentRelativesTia Landry(Twin Sister)Lisa Landry(Surrogate/adoptive mother)Ray Campbell(Adoptive Father)Ellen Campbell(Adoptive Mother; Deceased)Matt Sullivan(Biological Father)Racelle Gavin(Biological Mother; Deceased)RelationshipJordan Bennet- BoyfriendFirst AppearanceThe MeetingLast AppearanceFly Away HomePortrayed byTamera Mowryheather[cheer leard. in. to win 1] Tamera Anne Campbell(Tamera Mowry)is Tia's twin sister and Ray Campbell's daughter. Tamera Campbell  is highly impulsive and seems to care less about her intellects. She’s just as smart as her sister, but doesn't apply herself. She’s boy-crazy, but she cares about her friends and her family. She happens to love playing sports as well. Tamera Campbell  is highly impulsive and seems to care less about her intellects. characters.name: Terrence Winningham
characters.description: Terrence WinninghamNicknamesTiger Tail (Lisa)Date of BirthOctober 26GenderMaleOccupationManager of Food BoyRelativesUnnamed MotherUnnamed FatherRelationshipLisa Landry- ex-fiancéFirst AppearanceJoey's ChoiceLast AppearanceBig Twin on CampusPortrayed byDorien Wilson Unnamed Father Terrence Winninghamis the manager of the local Food Boy supermarket. Terrence is a kind man who doesn't have a problem with Lisa's overeating. He’s a babe magnet and he also enjoys making Lisa jealous after they broke up. Sometimes he is a  hypocrite…

characters.name: Tia Landry
characters.description: Tia LandryTia LandryNicknamesSister girl, look-alike (Tamera Campbell)Queen LaTia, crybaby (Climmie Collins)Date of BirthNovember 28, 1979GenderFemaleOccupationHigh school student (Season 1-5)College student (Season 6)RelativesLisa Landry(adoptive mother)Tamera Campbell(identical twin sister)Tahj (little cousin)Racelle Gavin(biological mother; deceased)Matthew Sullivan(biological father)Ray Campbell(surrogate/adoptive dad)Jimmy Campbell(adoptive grandfather)Darcy(adoptive aunt)Odessa Landry(adoptive grandmother)RelationshipMichaelRussellNickTyreke ScottCharlesFirst AppearanceThe MeetingLast AppearanceFly Away HomePortrayed byTia Mowry Tia Cameron Isabel Andrea Landry (Tia Mowry) is Tamera Campbell's twin sister and Lisa Landry's adoptive daughter. Before moving into her sister's father Ray Campbell's house with Lisa, Tia and her mother lived in an apartment on the other side of Detroit. Tia Cameron Isabel Andrea Laundry. She was born on November 28, 1979. Tia is usually honest, responsible, and mature. Tia is a straight-A student. She can lose her honest and responsible credit when she is around boys or scheming. The most noteworthy examples include Tia getting a joint tattoo with her then-boyfriend Michael (The Tattoo), swapping places with Tamera at Summer School so that she could get closer to her crush Nick, and leaving the house without permission to go on a date with Tyreke after Lisa forbade her to go upon learning that he had just been released from prison. characters.name: Tyreke Scott
characters.description: Tyreke ScottNicknamesCalliouDate of BirthUnknownGenderMaleOccupationMechanicSecurity EscortRelativesUnnamed MotherKenny - BrotherRelationshipTia Landry- Girlfriend (in love with)Ginger - Ex-GirlfriendFirst AppearanceWorking GirlsLast AppearanceFly Away HomePortrayed byRonReaco Lee Security Escort Kenny - Brother Travis " Tyreke " Scott   is caring and nice. Tyreke is also smart. He metTia LandryatBook 'Em Joe.A high school drop-out, after receiving his GED, he is permitted to graduate with the girls and Jordan, and later attends and gets a job as a security guard at the University of Michigan, where they attend college in the final season. He appears in Season 5 as a recurring cast member and is a series regular in Season 6.
characters.personality_section: Travis " Tyreke " Scott   is caring and nice. Tyreke is also smart. He appears in Season 5 as a recurring cast member and is a series regular in Season 6.

characters.name: Victor Sims
characters.description: He is Lisa's husband and Tia's stepdad. He is a friend of Ray since college as they met on the running team and was in the A-PHA. In Season 6, he moved back to Detroit, married Lisa, and became Tia’s stepfather.

characters.name: Vivica Shaw
characters.description: Vivica Shaw (Rolonda Watts) was a recurring character inSeason 5and appeared twice inSeason 6. She "is" nice and uses her looks to get things. However truly she is mean, rude and plays very dirty, she will also cheat on men and steal their businesses, such as Ray. Vivica And Ray started going out sometime beforeWorking Girls. They broke up inThe Best Policyafter Ray caught her cheating on him with another man. Since the other man broke up with her too, she became devastated. She was supposed to have moved back to Chicago, but she started a limo business to get him back. However, she got arrested for bribing and because her drivers didn't have proper licenses. She "is" nice and uses her looks to get things. However truly she is mean, rude and plays very dirty, she will also cheat on men and steal their businesses, such as Ray.
